flowchart TD
  A --> Cluster
  B --> Cluster
  subgraph Cluster
    direction LR
    In --> Work --> Out
  end
  Cluster --> Done
  Cluster --> Audit
---
  +----+     +------+
  |    |     |      |
  | A  |  +--|  B   |
  |    |  |  |      |
  +----+  |  +------+
     |    |
     |    |
     |    |
     |    |
     v----+
+----------------------------------+
|             Cluster              |
|                                  |
|                                  |
| +----+     +------+     +------+ |
| |    |     |      |     |      | |
| | In |---->| Work |---->| Out  | |-------+
| |    |     |      |     |      | |       |
| +----+     +------+     +------+ |       |
|                                  |       |
+----------------------------------+       |
                              |            |
                              |            |
                              v            v
                          +------+     +-------+
                          |      |     |       |
                          | Done |     | Audit |
                          |      |     |       |
                          +------+     +-------+
